name: DLL Injection with Tracker Detected
description: Detects DLL injection using tracker.exe, a technique used to bypass application whitelisting.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'tracker.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the tracker.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute tracker.exe, including '/d' or '/c'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which tracker.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
